message:
fix(vector): populate type_counts to fix type-filtered semantic search

Bug fix: VectorIndexCache.load() was leaving type_counts empty, causing
has_embeddings_for_types() to always return false for type-filtered
searches. This made semantic search with --types flag incorrectly fail
with "No embeddings found".

Changes:
- Add VectorIndex::type_counts() method to compute counts by doc type
- Use type_counts() in VectorIndexCache.load() instead of empty HashMap
- Refactor hybrid.rs to use borrowed strings for better performance
- Update cli_e2e.rs to adapt to FusedHit API change

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
